title: Little Orphan Annie
writer: Wanda Tuchock, Tom McNamara, Harold Gray
actors: Mitzi Green, Buster Phelps, May Robson
plot: Daddy Warbucks has to go on a long trip, leaving Annie alone. While wandering the street, Sandy leads Annie to discover Mickey, who is crying. Mickey's grandmother recently died, and he is about to be taken away by Mrs. Berger to ...
